# Repository Instructions

Use `agent.md` as the canonical project instructions.

Use the Markdown workflows in `skills/` when relevant:

- `skills/tdd-implementation/SKILL.md` for any non-trivial implementation.
- `skills/slide-deck-generator/SKILL.md` for creating or substantially changing
  a slide deck from a prompt.
- `skills/slide-visual-qa/SKILL.md` for visual validation, screenshots,
  contrast, dynamic diagrams, and presentation readiness.

Keep this file as a thin adapter for tools that read GitHub Copilot custom
instructions. Do not duplicate the full rules here; update `agent.md` and
`skills/` instead.
